title: Replace me: a PatchQuest course
description: A one-step seed course. Replace this section with the learning journey you want to track.

sections.title: Orient the learner
sections.goal: State the outcome and establish the evidence the learner will produce.
sections.action: Replace this seed action with one small, observable activity in the learner's workspace or learning context.

questions.prompt: What do you already know about this topic, and what evidence would show the intended outcome?
Describe the action you took, the evidence you produced, and one decision you can now explain.
